system.description:
Fill the area in front of the caster with a dangerous spray of colours and attack all targets in the area with multi-coloured beams. The attack has two advantages.

Rules: Enhance (attack, slightly more), Range, Area (slightly more), Damage-Duration, Damage Curse (Disorientation), Damage Barrage (Swarm of Colours), Damage Chain

Risk: 37

specials.name: This attack can hit another target outside of the original group
Sets opponent on fire, doing 1 hit per round until removed
Target suffers a disadvantage on next action
